questionHtml:
Now consider points x, y close to B on the phase plane. These coordinates can be rewritten as x=p+X and y=q+Y, where p and q are the values from part (b)(ii).

Hence sketch a complete set of trajectories in the phase plane for the original model, clearly indicating both equilibrium points.
markschemeHtml:
A1A1A1

 

Note: Award A1: At least one ellipse, oval or closed loop seen. Allow parts of ellipses shown (as in the diagram) as long as at least one complete loop observed.

Award A1: Arrows showing correct direction seen on at least one loop. Must be anti-clockwise on a closed loop.

Award A1: Ellipses remaining entirely in the 1st quadrant AND centre B marked in some way (either directly or via coordinates consistent with their B).

Do not follow through into part 2(h) from part 2(g).

[3 marks]

meta.title: Hence sketch a complete set of trajectories in the phase plane for the original model, clearly indicating both equilibrium points.
